summary.key_theme: 市場高度認可 Credo 在 AI 連接技術領域的領先地位，儘管面臨總體經濟與地緣政治帶來的短期股價波動。

bullish.title: Why Credo Technology (NASDAQ:CRDO) Is Emerging as a Leading AI Connectivity Play Across Copper and Optical Networking
bullish.reason: 該報導強調 Credo 在銅纜與光纖連接技術的關鍵地位，並指出其過去 3 年作為 AI 概念股的強勁表現，為長期投資價值提供基本面支撐。

bullish.title: Credo Technology Group (CRDO) Screens as a High-Growth CAN SLIM Leader with Strong Price Momentum
bullish.reason: 透過 CAN SLIM 選股系統篩選，確認該公司具備強勁的成長動能與技術面優勢，吸引動能交易者關注。

bullish.title: Credo Technology Group Holding (CRDO) Wins Analyst Backing, Is It Still 82% Overvalued?
bullish.reason: 儘管市場對估值存在分歧，但獲得分析師背書顯示其在半導體產業的競爭力受到專業機構認可。

bearish.title: Credo Technology (CRDO) Loses 8% Over Renewed US-Iran Tensions
bearish.reason: 受地緣政治緊張局勢影響，導致股價單日下跌 8 %，顯示市場情緒對外部風險較為敏感。

neutral.title: Here’s Why Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd (CRDO) is on the Detector List of the Fund
neutral.reason: 僅為投資機構的持倉揭露，屬於常規性資訊，對股價無直接驅動影響。

neutral.title: Are Computer and Technology Stocks Lagging Amkor Technology (AMKR) This Year?
neutral.reason: 僅為同業績效比較，提供投資人產業內部的相對表現參考，不構成買賣建議。
